Create automatic terrain designations for this tower.
Scan and place mining designations in this tower's area.
Designate all debris in the area for mining/removal. Overrides any forestry designations.
Clear all mining designations in this tower's area.
Width of generated access ramps (0 = disable ramp).
Maximum layers to excavate from the surface. (∞ = no limit.)

How strictly the scan filters for ore quality.
Off: include all tiles, dig to full depth.
Low: exclude very sparse tiles, trim thin trailing ore at the bottom.
Med: moderate quality — skip tiles with heavy overburden or little ore.
High: only rich tiles with a clean ore column.
Max: near-pure ore only — strict on overburden, depth and ore density.

Minimum corridor width for connecting ore regions and enforcing passability.
0 = disabled (regions left separate, no corridors or hole-filling).
1 = 1-tile corridors (small and medium vehicles).
2 = 2-tile corridors (mega vehicles).
Force the scan to target a specific product. None = useful products first, then debris, then dirt.
Ramp generation failed — no valid path found.
Ramp placed but did not reach the surface — excavators may not be able to excavate.
Couldn't find a valid path from the tower to the generated ramp. Check for access problems.
Automates the preparation and final filling of flat level designations so their top layer becomes farmable.
Prepare flat level designations for farmland by clearing unsuitable top material, then restoring the final fill orders.
Ore resources within this tower's current mining designations. (Does not account for potential landslides.)
Excavators set to prioritize {0}. Click to unset.
